User Story: As a user, I want to sign in with a role-aware account so that I can access the correct functions.
Acceptance Criteria: Given a valid username and password, login succeeds; invalid credentials show a clear error; the user is routed to the correct dashboard based on role.
Rationale: Required to access every other feature.

User Story: As a TA, I want to create and edit my profile so that I can present my background to recruiters.
Acceptance Criteria: TA can enter name, student ID, programme, skills, availability, and prior experience; required fields are validated; profile changes are saved to text-based storage.

User Story: As a TA, I want to paste or upload CV text so that the system can use it for matching and review.
Acceptance Criteria: System accepts CV as plain text or .txt content; saved content is linked to the applicant profile; MO can read the stored CV content.

User Story: As a TA, I want to browse open jobs so that I can decide what to apply for.
Acceptance Criteria: TA can see a list of open jobs with title, module, deadline, workload and status; closed jobs are clearly marked or hidden; data loads from text-based storage.

User Story: As a TA, I want to search and filter jobs so that I can quickly find relevant opportunities.
Acceptance Criteria: TA can filter by module, skill, date or keyword; filtered results update correctly; reset restores the full list.

User Story: As a TA, I want to view detailed job requirements so that I can judge whether I am suitable.
Acceptance Criteria: Job detail page shows responsibilities, required skills, preferred skills, schedule, deadline and quota; missing or expired jobs show a clear message.

User Story: As a TA, I want to apply for a job so that I can be considered for the role.
Acceptance Criteria: TA can submit one application per job; duplicate submission is blocked; successful submission creates an application record with timestamp and initial status.

User Story: As a TA, I want to track my application status so that I know whether I am shortlisted, accepted or rejected.
Acceptance Criteria: TA dashboard shows every submitted application and current status; status updates become visible after MO action; unknown application IDs are handled safely.

User Story: As a TA, I want to withdraw an application before the deadline so that I can correct mistakes or change my plan.
Acceptance Criteria: Withdraw option is available only before the deadline and before final decision; withdrawn status is stored and visible; workload is not counted for withdrawn applications.

User Story: As an MO, I want to create a job posting so that I can recruit TAs for a module or activity.
Acceptance Criteria: MO can create a posting with title, description, skills, deadline, quota and workload; required fields are validated; new jobs appear in the TA job list.

User Story: As an MO, I want to edit or close a job so that the vacancy stays accurate.
Acceptance Criteria: MO can update job details before the deadline; MO can close a job; closed jobs can no longer accept new applications.

User Story: As an MO, I want to review applicants for a job so that I can compare candidates.
Acceptance Criteria: MO can see applicant list, profile summary, CV text, skills, availability and current workload; list is limited to applicants for the selected job.

User Story: As an MO, I want to shortlist, accept or reject applicants so that the recruitment process can move forward.
Acceptance Criteria: MO can change status to shortlisted, accepted or rejected; quota rules are enforced; TA is able to see the updated status.

User Story: As an admin, I want to see each TA's total workload so that work can be distributed fairly.
Acceptance Criteria: Admin dashboard shows accepted assignments and total workload for every TA; data refreshes after status changes; overloaded users are clearly flagged.

User Story: As an admin, I want the system to warn when workload limits are exceeded so that MOs avoid over-allocation.
Acceptance Criteria: System shows warning before accepting a candidate whose workload exceeds a configurable threshold; warning is recorded in the audit trail.

User Story: As a TA, I want recommended jobs ranked for me so that I can focus on the most suitable opportunities.
Acceptance Criteria: System ranks jobs using skill match, availability and workload balance; each recommendation shows a score and brief explanation; recommendations update when profile changes.

User Story: As an MO, I want applicants ranked for a job so that I can shortlist faster.
Acceptance Criteria: System ranks applicants by required skill match, preferred skill match, availability and workload balance; ranked list includes explanation for each candidate.

User Story: As a TA, I want to see missing skills for a job so that I know how to improve my fit.
Acceptance Criteria: For each viewed job, system highlights matched skills and missing skills; explanations are understandable and based on structured rules or extracted keywords.

User Story: As a user, I want clear validation and error feedback so that I can recover from mistakes quickly.
Acceptance Criteria: Invalid input produces readable messages; missing files or unavailable records do not crash the system; error cases are demonstrated in test cases.
Rationale: Important for demo and acceptance tasks.

User Story: As an admin, I want an audit trail of important actions so that decisions can be reviewed later.
Acceptance Criteria: System records login, job posting, application, status update and workload warning events in text-based logs; logs can be viewed or exported as CSV.
Rationale: Useful for governance and viva discussion.

User Story: As the system, I want to prevent duplicate or lost applications under concurrent access so that records remain correct.
Acceptance Criteria: Parallel submissions do not create duplicate records for the same TA and job; successful applications are persisted safely; concurrent tests prove consistency.

User Story: As the system, I want atomic file writes and safe reloads so that text files are not corrupted.
Acceptance Criteria: Writes use temp-file plus rename or equivalent safe mechanism; recovery from partial failure is tested; data can be reloaded after restart.

User Story: As the system, I want fast read performance for popular pages so that multiple users can browse smoothly.
Acceptance Criteria: Job browsing and recommendation pages use cached in-memory indexes or equivalent optimisation; repeated reads remain responsive under load test.

User Story: As the teaching team, I want the system to support end-to-end acceptance testing so that required tasks can be demonstrated reliably.
Acceptance Criteria: Core scenarios for TA, MO and Admin can be executed in sequence; sample data is provided; README and user manual explain setup and testing steps.
Rationale: Directly supports final viva and marking.
